title: Contact Peter
meta_description: Get in touch with Peter Dowd MP. If you have an issue and live in Bootle constituency, Crosby, Waterloo, Seaforth, Litherland, Netherton, Orrell and Ford, Peter may be able to help.
text_excerpt: Contact Peter Peter Dowd Home About Gallery Contact Privacy Notice My work in the community My work in Parliament My views Home About Gallery Contact Peter Dowd Labour Member of Parliament for Bootle Privacy Notice My work in the community My work in Parliament My views Contact Peter Address : Opportunities House 270 Marsh Lane, Bootle, L20 5BW Telephone : 0151 933 8432 Email : peter.dowd.mp@parliament.uk For any local issues, please contact your local councillors who are best placed to assist. To find a local Sefton councillor please click here .
